p.strong: sizeof=72 bytes (fits in single cache line)

ul.li: Total: 72 bytes (one cache line on x86-64)
Payload and ConsumerID are slice/string headers (ptr + len + cap)
Actual string/byte data stored separately on heap
time.Time is 24 bytes (wall + ext + loc pointer)
All fields 8-byte aligned for atomic access

div.p: InFlightMessage - Tracks delivered but unacknowledged messages
